proposal1.heroHeadline: GGS is losing 1,000 hours annually on manual proposal writing. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting proposals is draining time from GGS's mission to innovate. Switch to 47-second automation.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment spent on outdated processes is costing GGS time and money.

problems.title: Time Wasted
problems.description: Each proposal takes hours to craft. That's hundreds of hours not spent on designing inclusive solutions for partners.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean missed chances. Every day waiting costs potential partnerships in the design sector.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals lead to brand inconsistencies. Every inconsistency dilutes GGS's reputation in equity-driven design.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Limited team size means every hour counts. Wasting time on proposals strains resources that could enhance project impact.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled staff for mundane tasks is inefficient. Every dollar spent on proposal writing is a dollar not invested in innovation.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround affects competitiveness. Quick responses are vital in the fast-paced design industry.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these inefficiencies with precision and speed.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take too long to write. Our system delivers complete, branded proposals in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes cause branding errors. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with GGS's brand.

solutions.title: Enhanced Focus
solutions.description: Time spent writing proposals detracts from project work. Automation allows GGS to focus on creating impactful designs.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: Paying for manual tasks is costly. Our system reduces labor costs by automating proposal generation.

solutions.title: Competitive Edge
solutions.description: Slow proposals hinder competitiveness. Automated proposals provide the speed needed to stay ahead in design.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for GGS's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for GGS around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for GGS.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Reach with Human-Centered Design.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: By leveraging GGS's expertise in human-centered design, we will enhance Acme Corp's inclusivity and innovation to drive impact.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every missed opportunity to engage is potential growth lost.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without engaging is lost revenue. A 60% bounce rate could mean thousands of dollars in unrealized potential.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: A complicated user journey can cost you repeat business. 75% of users will not return to a site after a bad experience.

problems.title: Weak Brand Identity
problems.description: A diluted brand presence leads to lower customer loyalty. Losing even 10% of returning clients can result in significant revenue loss.

problems.title: Ineffective Communication
problems.description: Your message should resonate with your audience. Misaligned messaging can lead to a 25% decrease in engagement.

problems.title: Limited Market Reach
problems.description: Not tapping into new demographics restricts growth. Missing out on emerging markets could mean forfeiting a 20% increase in market share.

problems.title: Suboptimal Conversion Rate
problems.description: Every unconverted lead is a missed sale. Improving your conversion rate by just 1% can lead to significant revenue increase.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these losses by enhancing user engagement and brand presence.

solutions.title: User Experience Design
solutions.description: Enhances user interaction to reduce bounce rates. A streamlined journey keeps visitors engaged and more likely to convert.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: Strengthens brand identity to foster loyalty. A clear brand message builds trust and repeat business.

solutions.title: Market Research
solutions.description: Identifies new market opportunities for expansion. Understanding your audience leads to targeted growth strategies.

solutions.title: Communication Strategy
solutions.description: Refines your messaging for better audience connection. Clear communication enhances engagement and conversion rates.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: GGS provides innovative solutions driven by a commitment to equity and impact.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Years of experience in transforming brands through human-centered design.

whyUsCards.title: Social Impact
whyUsCards.description: We focus on building a more equitable society with every project we undertake.

whyUsCards.title: Client Partnership
whyUsCards.description: We build lasting relationships with our clients, ensuring continuous support and growth.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our team uses cutting-edge strategies to solve complex business challenges.

socialProof.label: Average client growth in the first year.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that will drive your project's success.

team.name: George Aye
team.bio: George leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring tailored solutions that align with client goals.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery and Research
process.description: We dive deep into understanding your business and your audience.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Crafting a tailored strategy for your unique needs.

process.title: Design and Implementation
process.description: Bringing the strategy to life with innovative design solutions.

process.title: Launch and Evaluation
process.description: Ensuring successful implementation and measuring impact.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Consider our pricing tiers as strategic investments for your growth.

pricing.name: Growth Plan
pricing.description: Recommended for businesses targeting significant growth.

proposal2.ctaHeadline: Ready to Transform Acme Corp's Future?
proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's have a conversation to explore how we can partner for success.

lead.company_description:
Greater Good Studio advances people-centered social change.

By working alongside people who are impacted by social inequity, we co-design strategies and solutions that challenge the status quo.

We envision a world where all social change efforts are inclusive and working towards equity.
